# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers that I do not create commits; they will commit files themselves.
- If changes are made to the local `RadLibsAdminTool`, explicitly inform the user so they can mirror those changes into the `RadLibs` repo.

## Rad Libs Collection Requirements
- Each collection must contain exactly 20 stories.
- Each story should include only 15-20 blanks, following a silly classic Mad Libs style.
- Collection-level naming for Rad Libs packs should always include a number suffix (e.g., `Peter Pan 1`, `Peter Pan 2`) for future series entries.
